description: Append-only audit log of every corpus/case change. Actor, action (controlled vocabulary), severity, before/after JSON, timestamp. Distinct from Dataverse platform auditing -- this is the domain-level workflow trail the predecessor tool lacked.

lifecycle.note: One of the four M1-live tables. Append-only (no updates/deletes in normal operation).

primaryColumn.description: One-line human summary of the event (action + subject).

columns.description: -> Case (nullable: some events are corpus-level, not case-level). 1:N Case->AuditEvent.
Flow name (e.g. Flow_Intake_<mailbox>) or staff display name.
Controlled action vocabulary (graph_message_ingested, case_created, status_changed, ...). Extend additively only.
JSON snapshot of relevant state before the change (null for create/ingest events).
JSON snapshot of relevant state after the change.
When the event occurred (event time, not row-create time).

notes: Append-only: writers never update/delete; security roles should deny update/delete to non-Management.
caseId nullable because corpus/import events (jobsheet_imported, corpus_record_changed) are not case-scoped.
